_comment: Shared COMSOL MCP startup settings. Keep this file stable and use the same file for every agent.

profile._comment: Static tool profile. core is the safe default; change only when the MCP host will be restarted.
profile._comment_name: Examples: core, basic_fem, wave_optics, semantic_docs, desktop_shared, experimental, or full.
profile.name: core

runtime._comment: Durable runtime roots. null selects the platform-safe default; configured paths must be absolute.
runtime._comment_directory: Example: D:/comsol_runtime. null uses D:/comsol_runtime when available, otherwise the platform default.
runtime._comment_jobs_directory: Example: D:/comsol_runtime/jobs. null uses the jobs subdirectory below directory.

paths._comment: Containment roots. Keep model reads empty until an explicit existing model directory is approved.
paths._comment_model_read_roots: Example: ["D:/comsol_models"]. Every directory must be absolute and existing when used.

shared_server._comment: Shared Desktop/attached-Server collaboration is deliberately disabled by default.
shared_server._comment_enabled: Set true only after manually starting the local COMSOL Server and restarting the MCP host.

evidence_integrity._comment: Every formal evidence check is default-on. Set an individual value false only for declared exploration.

checks._comment_outcome_contract_validation: Verify declared outcomes and their machine-readable contract.
checks._comment_artifact_chain_verification: Verify owned artifact bytes, provenance, and hash-chain identity.
checks._comment_summary_claim_verification: Verify summary claims against exact cited artifact values.
checks._comment_producer_driver_compatibility: Verify resume producer and driver identities before continuation.

semantic_docs._comment: Optional isolated semantic retrieval paths. The profile remains unavailable until all required artifacts exist.
semantic_docs._comment_root: Example: D:/comsol_semantic. Use an ASCII-only absolute deployment root.
semantic_docs._comment_lexical_index: Example: D:/comsol_docs_fts/manuals.sqlite3. This is the immutable lexical index file.
semantic_docs._comment_model_path: Example: D:/comsol_semantic/models/all-MiniLM-L6-v2/revision. null leaves semantic retrieval unavailable.

ownership._comment: Optional stable owner label. null derives a bounded label from the parent agent process.
ownership._comment_owner: Example: codex-mcp or opencode-mcp. null auto-detects the parent agent label.

java._comment: Optional COMSOL-bundled Java paths. null preserves the host Java environment.
java._comment_java_home: Example: D:/COMSOL64/Multiphysics/java/win64/jre. Set only when COMSOL's bundled Java is needed.
java._comment_jdk_home: Example: D:/COMSOL64/Multiphysics/java/win64/jre. Usually the same value as java_home.
